_Generated 2026-05-05T17:13_

## Summary

- **Total facility-level change records:** 39,695
- **High-signal changes** (operational control / 5% direct/indirect): 24,474
- **Facilities with at least one high-signal change:** 3,918
- **Facilities with any change:** 4,252
- **Multi-facility clusters** (same entity/parent across 3+ facilities, same direction): 1,486

Roles considered high-signal: 5% OR GREATER DIRECT OWNERSHIP INTEREST, 5% OR GREATER INDIRECT OWNERSHIP INTEREST, OPERATIONAL/MANAGERIAL CONTROL
